title: evodianthus funifer subsp. peruvianus
intro: Evodianthus funifer subsp. peruvianus is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the Peruvian Evodia or Evodia Peruviana, native to Peru. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Evodianthus funifer subsp. peruvianus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
